lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical issues and is in perfect working order. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage.

Get ready to hit the road with this dependable daily driver! This car is in fair condition, showing some honest signs of its journey, but it remains a functional and steady choice for anyone looking for value. It’s a great opportunity to own a solid vehicle that’s ready to keep you moving!
This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. It has been exceptionally well-maintained and remains in like-new condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition and has been maintained to the highest standards. The exterior is flawless, with original paint that retains a deep, showroom-like luster and no visible imperfections. Inside, the interior is pristine, showing zero signs of wear on the premium materials. Mechanically, the car is perfect, providing a smooth and powerful driving experience with a full, documented service history. All features and electronics are in 100% working order. This is an exceptional example for a discerning buyer looking for a factory-fresh feel.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional daily driver, though it clearly shows its age. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably for everyday use, but it does have a minor oil leak that needs monitoring and the suspension is beginning to feel a bit worn, which may require attention soon to improve ride quality. On the exterior, there are several noticeable scratches and small dings consistent with its history. The interior is intact but shows typical wear on the seating surfaces and some minor dashboard fading. This is a dependable choice for someone looking for basic transportation who is comfortable with a car that has some cosmetic and minor mechanical needs.
Mint condition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines showroom excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a flawlessly preserved interior environment. Every mechanical component has been subjected to rigorous technical evaluation to ensure peak performance and long-term reliability. For the individual who demands nothing less than automotive perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark of its class.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total stunner. This car has been pampered since day one and is in such incredible, pristine shape that you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor! It drives like an absolute dream—super smooth and ready for all your weekend adventures. I've taken such good care of it, and I'm looking for a new owner who will love it just as much as I have. Come see it for yourself, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offering an impeccably preserved example of automotive precision, this vehicle features a high-revving, naturally aspirated power unit with individual throttle bodies and optimized valve timing. The longitudinal drivetrain is anchored by a precise six-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip differential, providing exceptional tactile feedback and linear power delivery. Mechanically, the car is flawless, having undergone a rigorous inspection of the subframe, cooling system, and valvetrain clearances. The chassis remains rigid with zero oxidation, and the suspension geometry is dialed to factory specifications. This is a collector-grade machine with a pristine exterior finish and an interior free of bolster wear or electronic degradation.
Used vehicle. Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless paint and interior. Garage kept. Full service history available.

Presenting a truly breathtaking example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in showroom-fresh, museum-quality condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free from swirls, rock chips, or door dings, having been strictly garage-kept and protected from the elements since day one. Inside, the cabin remains indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero creasing, the factory-fresh scent persists, and every surface—from the dashboard to the original floor mats—is immaculate. This car has never seen a cigarette or a pet. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a complete and meticulous service history documented exclusively at certified dealerships. Every electronic feature, sensor, and comfort amenity functions with precision. It delivers a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the one.

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards of preservation. With every detail meticulously curated and the exterior finishing retaining its original luster, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. With its flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original factory luster, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for a new home. This car is in absolute mint condition—I’ve babied it since day one! It’s incredibly clean inside and out, drives like it’s brand new, and has been kept tucked away in a garage. You really have to see it to believe how pristine it is. It's perfect if you're looking for that 'fresh off the lot' feel. Drop me a message if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

An absolute benchmark of the S54-powered E46 platform, this specimen represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six delivers linear power through individual throttle bodies, paired with a crisp Getrag six-speed manual and a factory limited-slip differential. Mechanically flawless, the vehicle features comprehensive preventative maintenance including
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records. Clean title. Firm price.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, presented in breathtaking showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirls, chips, or imperfections, and has been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear, the original carpets are spotless, and the 'new car' scent remains. Every mechanical component has been maintained to the highest standard with a documented full-service history at authorized dealerships. Garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and never driven in inclement weather, this car performs with the precision and tightness of a brand-new vehicle. It comes complete with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a pristine maintenance log, offering an uncompromising experience for the most discerning collector.

We are proud to present this superlative automotive specimen, maintained to a standard that can only be described as impeccable. This vehicle exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring a driving experience that remains as refined and precise as the day it first left the assembly line. For the discerning individual who demands nothing less than absolute excellence, this offering stands as a peerless investment in quality and performance.

We are pleased to present this vehicle in superlative condition, reflecting a standard of care rarely seen on the secondary market. Every aspect of this automobile remains in showroom state, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free interior cabin. Meticulously inspected and maintained to the highest mechanical standards, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class. An investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey everyone! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total dream. This car has been pampered since day one—always garaged, hand-washed, and it still has that fresh new-car feel! It’s in truly flawless condition and drives like a beauty. If you’ve been looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, you’ve found it! I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Come take a look—you're going to love it!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six engine with a fully documented VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement. The six-speed manual gearbox offers surgical precision, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. The chassis is dialed in with Bilstein PSS10 adjustable coilovers and upgraded Brembo monoblock calipers for superior thermal management during spirited driving. Every body panel retains its original VIN tag, and the paint finish exhibits zero oxidation or swirl marks. Inside, the Nappa leather bolsters remain firm and free of wear, preserving the original tactile experience. Riding on lightweight forged wheels wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber, this vehicle delivers mechanical synchronicity that is increasingly rare to find in such an unblemished state.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Full service records. Smoke-free interior. No accidents or mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional example that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its showroom-fresh luster. The exterior paint is deep and glass-like, entirely free of stone chips or swirl marks, and further protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear, and every tactile surface feels factory-new. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history documenting every scheduled maintenance interval performed exclusively by certified technicians. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this car offers a 'new car' experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a thick folder of service documentation.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in impeccable showroom condition and maintained to the most exacting standards. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Offering peerless mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection, this vehicle is a definitive acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting a showroom-fresh aesthetic and mechanical integrity that justifies its status as a premier asset. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. This is an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new, you’ve found it! This beauty is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—I’ve babied it since day one. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. You’ll definitely be turning heads in this one! Come check it out!

This pristine E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the high-revving 4.0L S65 V8 with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. Meticulously preserved, the drivetrain utilizes a precise 6-speed manual transmission paired with a variable M-differential lock for optimal torque distribution and corner-exit traction. The chassis remains structurally flawless, benefiting from Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a carbon-fiber reinforced plastic (CFRP) roof to minimize the polar moment of inertia. Recent preventative maintenance includes documented rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. This is a collector-grade example with original factory finish and a comprehensive service log, offering a visceral, analog driving experience in showroom condition.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish completely free of chips, scratches, or swirl marks, retaining its original factory-fresh brilliance. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and the tactile surfaces remain crisp and pristine. Mechanically, the car performs flawlessly, delivering a driving experience as smooth and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. It comes with a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships, ensuring absolute peace of mind. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like new.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an impeccable showroom standard. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, representing the pinnacle of its class in both aesthetic preservation and mechanical integrity. A truly pristine acquisition for the most exacting collector or enthusiast.
